name: Broken Window Glass Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package (3 oz) Cool Whip Topping, thawed OR
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Jell-o flavors separately by dissolving each in 1 cup of boiling water and adding 1/2 cup of cold water. Pour each flavor into separate 8-inch square pans. Chill until firm, at least 3 hours or overnight.
2. Cut the chilled Jell-o layers into 1/2-inch cubes.
3. Mix the graham cracker crumbs with melted butter. Set aside about 1/4 cup for garnish if desired, and press the remaining mixture evenly over the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch springform or tube pan. Chill.
4. Dissolve the lemon Jell-o and sugar in 1 cup boiling water; add pineapple juice. Chill until slightly thickened.
5. Blend in the whipped topping. Fold in the Jell-o cubes.
6. Spoon the mixture into the crumb-lined pan. Chill overnight or until firm.
7. Just before serving, run a spatula around the sides of the pan, then gently remove the sides. Garnish with reserved crumbs or additional whipped topping and tinted flaked coconut if desired.
